title: [Frontend] Page 1 — Login
body:
## Page 1 — Login
**Route:** `/login`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 3.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Centered card layout (no sidebar)
- [ ] Username/email + password fields
- [ ] Remember Me checkbox
- [ ] Toggle password visibility
- [ ] Login button + Forgot Password link
- [ ] 5-attempt lockout message with timestamp
- [ ] Redirect to `/change-password` if `requirePasswordChange=true`
- [ ] Redirect to `/mfa-verify` if `mfaEnabled=true`
- [ ] Auto-login on page load if valid cookie (`GET /auth/session`)
- [ ] `POST /auth/login` wired up
- [ ] Error: "Invalid username or password" (never specify which field)
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 2 — Forgot Password
body:
## Page 2 — Forgot Password
**Route:** `/forgot-password`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 3.2

### Checklist
- [ ] Centered card layout
- [ ] Email input with RFC 5322 validation
- [ ] Always show success message regardless of email existence
- [ ] Back to Login link
- [ ] `POST /auth/forgot-password` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 3 — Reset Password
body:
## Page 3 — Reset Password
**Route:** `/reset-password?token={token}`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 3.3

### Checklist
- [ ] Token validation on page load (`GET /auth/validate-reset-token`)
- [ ] Show error if token invalid/expired
- [ ] New password + Confirm password fields (both with toggle)
- [ ] Real-time confirm match check
- [ ] Password complexity: min 8, 1 upper, 1 lower, 1 digit, 1 special
- [ ] `POST /auth/reset-password` wired up
- [ ] Redirect to `/login` on success
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 4 — Force Change Password
body:
## Page 4 — Force Change Password
**Route:** `/change-password`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 3.4

### Checklist
- [ ] Route guard: redirect here if valid JWT but `requirePasswordChange=true`
- [ ] Cannot navigate away (no sidebar, no other links)
- [ ] Current password + New password + Confirm password
- [ ] Complexity validation
- [ ] Logout link as only escape
- [ ] `PUT /auth/change-password` wired up
- [ ] Redirect to `/admin` on success
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 5 — MFA Verify
body:
## Page 5 — MFA Verify
**Route:** `/mfa-verify`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 3.5

### Checklist
- [ ] 6-digit OTP input (numeric only)
- [ ] Auto-submit on 6 digits entered
- [ ] Back to Login link (clears pre-auth state)
- [ ] `POST /auth/verify-mfa` wired up
- [ ] Redirect to `/admin` on full JWT issued
- [ ] Max 5 wrong attempts lockout handling
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] AdminShell Layout + Shared Components
body:
## AdminShell Layout + Component Library
**Blueprint ref:** Section 1, Sprint 1

### Checklist
- [ ] Sidebar navigation with all module links
- [ ] Header (user avatar, tenant name, language toggle EN/AR)
- [ ] RTL layout switching (LTR ↔ RTL)
- [ ] Mantine theme: teal/navy color system
- [ ] `StatusBadge` shared component
- [ ] `ConfirmModal` shared component
- [ ] `usePermission()` hook wired to auth store
- [ ] Route guards (authenticated, requirePasswordChange, MFA)
- [ ] All 31 routes lazy-loaded
- [ ] Redux auth store setup

title: [Frontend] Page 6 — Admin Dashboard
body:
## Page 6 — Admin Dashboard
**Route:** `/admin`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 4

### Checklist
- [ ] 4 KPI cards: Tenants, Users, Active Sessions, Audit Events (24h)
- [ ] Activity bar chart (audit_logs grouped by day, last 7 days)
- [ ] Recent audit events table (last 10, clickable rows)
- [ ] KPI cards navigate to respective list pages
- [ ] All data loaded in parallel via React Query
- [ ] `GET /dashboard/stats` wired up
- [ ] `GET /audit?limit=10&sort=created_at:desc` wired up
- [ ] Permission gates: `TENANT:READ`, `USER:READ`, `AUDIT:READ`
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 7 — Tenant List
body:
## Page 7 — Tenant List
**Route:** `/admin/tenants`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 5.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Paginated table with all columns (code, name EN+AR, type, subscription, users/limit, status)
- [ ] Search (debounced 300ms) by name/code
- [ ] Filters: Org Type, Status, Subscription dropdowns
- [ ] Status progress indicator for users/limit
- [ ] Inline status toggle with ConfirmModal for deactivate
- [ ] Create / View / Edit / Delete / Export actions
- [ ] Permission gates per action
- [ ] `GET /tenants` wired up
- [ ] `PATCH /tenants/:id/status` wired up
- [ ] `DELETE /tenants/:id` wired up (soft delete)
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 8 — Tenant Create / Edit
body:
## Page 8 — Tenant Create / Edit
**Route:** `/admin/tenants/new` | `/:id/edit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 5.2

### Checklist
- [ ] 4-tab form: Basic Info | Contact | Subscription | Settings
- [ ] All fields per blueprint (EN + AR names, org type, parent tenant, etc.)
- [ ] Tenant Code disabled in edit mode
- [ ] Async unique code check (debounced 500ms)
- [ ] Sub End Date >= Sub Start validation
- [ ] `POST /tenants` and `PUT /tenants/:id` wired up
- [ ] `GET /tenants/:id` pre-fill on edit
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 9 — Tenant Detail
body:
## Page 9 — Tenant Detail
**Route:** `/admin/tenants/:id`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 5.3

### Checklist
- [ ] Header card: name, code, status, type, subscription (always visible)
- [ ] 4 tabs: Overview | Branches | Config | Audit Trail
- [ ] Branches tab: table + inline Create Branch button
- [ ] Config tab: key/value table with inline edit
- [ ] Audit tab: last 50 events
- [ ] Edit + Change Status with ConfirmModal
- [ ] All tab API calls wired up
- [ ] Permission gates per action
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 10 — Tenant Config
body:
## Page 10 — Tenant Config
**Route:** `/admin/tenants/:id/config`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 5.4

### Checklist
- [ ] Table grouped by config key prefix
- [ ] Encrypted values show `######`
- [ ] Inline edit (save on blur), JSONB editor
- [ ] Reveal encrypted (eye icon, 5s then re-mask, logged in audit)
- [ ] Add Config inline new row
- [ ] Delete with ConfirmModal
- [ ] All CRUD endpoints wired up
- [ ] Permission gates: `CONFIG:READ/UPDATE/CREATE/DELETE`
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 11 — Branch List
body:
## Page 11 — Branch List
**Route:** `/admin/branches`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 6.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Table: code, name, tenant, type, HQ (star badge), city, status
- [ ] HQ branch visually highlighted
- [ ] Tenant column hidden for tenant-scoped users
- [ ] Filters: Search, Tenant (super-admin only), Type, Status, HQ toggle
- [ ] Status toggle with ConfirmModal
- [ ] Cannot delete HQ if other branches exist (handle backend error)
- [ ] All API calls wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 12 — Branch Create / Edit
body:
## Page 12 — Branch Create / Edit
**Route:** `/admin/branches/new` | `/:id/edit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 6.2

### Checklist
- [ ] Drawer or inline form layout
- [ ] All fields per blueprint (EN + AR names, type, HQ toggle, etc.)
- [ ] Branch Code disabled in edit
- [ ] Async unique code check within tenant
- [ ] Is HQ one per tenant validation (handle backend error)
- [ ] `POST /branches` and `PUT /branches/:id` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 13 — User List
body:
## Page 13 — User List
**Route:** `/admin/users`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 7.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Table: avatar (initials), full name, username, email (verified checkmark), employee ID, type, status, MFA shield, last login
- [ ] Bulk activate/deactivate bar
- [ ] Filters: Search (debounced), Status, Type, Branch, MFA toggle, Last Login date range
- [ ] Lock/Unlock, Reset Password with ConfirmModal
- [ ] Cannot delete own account
- [ ] All API calls wired up including bulk status
- [ ] Permission gates per action
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 14 — User Create / Edit
body:
## Page 14 — User Create / Edit
**Route:** `/admin/users/new` | `/:id/edit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 7.2

### Checklist
- [ ] 3-tab form: Identity | Account | Preferences
- [ ] All fields per blueprint (EN + AR names, username, email, mobile, employee ID, national ID masked)
- [ ] Username auto-suggestion, disabled in edit
- [ ] Async unique checks: username + email (debounced 500ms)
- [ ] National ID: 10 digits, stored encrypted (masked input)
- [ ] On create: auto-generate temp password, `requirePasswordChange=true`
- [ ] `POST /users` and `PUT /users/:id` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 15 — User Detail
body:
## Page 15 — User Detail
**Route:** `/admin/users/:id`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 7.3

### Checklist
- [ ] Profile header + 5 tabs: Profile | Roles | Groups | Tenant Access | Sessions
- [ ] Effective Permissions section (merged user_roles + group_roles, flattened)
- [ ] Assign Role modal → `POST /users/:id/roles/:roleId`
- [ ] Revoke Role with ConfirmModal
- [ ] Add to Group modal
- [ ] Grant Tenant Access modal
- [ ] Terminate Session / Terminate All Sessions
- [ ] Lock/Unlock and Reset Password from header
- [ ] All tab API calls wired up
- [ ] Permission gates: `ASSIGN_ROLE`, `REVOKE_ROLE`, `USER:UPDATE`
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 16 — User Sessions
body:
## Page 16 — User Sessions
**Route:** `/admin/users/:id/sessions`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 7.4

### Checklist
- [ ] Table: login time, last activity (relative), IP, browser+OS (parsed), expires, status badge
- [ ] Active sessions visually highlighted
- [ ] Terminate Session per row (active only) with ConfirmModal
- [ ] Terminate All Sessions button
- [ ] All API calls wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 17 — User Tenant Access
body:
## Page 17 — User Tenant Access
**Route:** `/admin/users/:id/access`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 7.5

### Checklist
- [ ] Table: tenant name (link), code, status, granted by, granted date
- [ ] Grant Access: tenant selector modal → `POST /users/:id/tenant-access/:tenantId`
- [ ] Revoke Access with ConfirmModal
- [ ] All API calls wired up
- [ ] Permission gates: `USER:READ`, `USER:UPDATE`
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 18 — Group List
body:
## Page 18 — Group List
**Route:** `/admin/groups`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 8.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Table: code (badge), name EN+AR, members count (clickable), roles count, status
- [ ] Filters: Search, Status
- [ ] Delete warns about affected member count (cascade soft delete)
- [ ] `GET /groups` wired up
- [ ] `DELETE /groups/:id` wired up
- [ ] Permission gates per action
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 19 — Group Create / Edit
body:
## Page 19 — Group Create / Edit
**Route:** `/admin/groups/new` | `/:id/edit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 8.2

### Checklist
- [ ] Inline form: code, name EN+AR, description, status
- [ ] Group Code disabled in edit
- [ ] Async unique code check within tenant
- [ ] `POST /groups` and `PUT /groups/:id` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 20 — Group Detail
body:
## Page 20 — Group Detail
**Route:** `/admin/groups/:id`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 8.3

### Checklist
- [ ] Header card + 2 tabs: Members | Roles
- [ ] Members tab: user search modal → Add, Remove with ConfirmModal
- [ ] Roles tab: role selector → Assign, Revoke with ConfirmModal
- [ ] Tooltip on roles: "X users inherit this role through this group"
- [ ] All API calls wired up
- [ ] Permission gates: `GROUP:UPDATE`, `ASSIGN_ROLE`, `REVOKE_ROLE`
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 21 — Role List
body:
## Page 21 — Role List
**Route:** `/admin/roles`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 9.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Table: code (lock icon if system), name, type (SYSTEM blue/CUSTOM gray), scope, permissions count, users count, status
- [ ] System roles: Edit + Delete disabled, tooltip shown
- [ ] Filters: Search, Type toggle (System/Custom/All), Status
- [ ] View Permissions (key icon) → `/roles/:id/permissions`
- [ ] Delete warns about affected users+groups
- [ ] `GET /roles` wired up
- [ ] Permission gates per action
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 22 — Role Create / Edit
body:
## Page 22 — Role Create / Edit
**Route:** `/admin/roles/new` | `/:id/edit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 9.2

### Checklist
- [ ] Single form: code, name EN+AR, description, scope, status
- [ ] Role Code disabled in edit
- [ ] Scope: GLOBAL | TENANT-SPECIFIC
- [ ] `POST /roles` and `PUT /roles/:id` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 23 — Role Permissions Matrix
body:
## Page 23 — Role Permissions Matrix
**Route:** `/admin/roles/:id/permissions`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 9.3

### Checklist
- [ ] Matrix: rows = modules, columns = 7 operations (CREATE/READ/UPDATE/DELETE/EXPORT/PRINT/APPROVE)
- [ ] Sticky first column (module names) + sticky header row (operations)
- [ ] Checkbox: checked = teal fill, unchecked = white, saving = gray spinner per cell
- [ ] Single toggle: immediate POST or DELETE
- [ ] On error: revert checkbox + error toast
- [ ] Row master checkbox: batch grant/revoke all ops for a module
- [ ] Copy From Role: dropdown + ConfirmModal
- [ ] System roles: all checkboxes read-only
- [ ] Warn if revoking READ while CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE still granted
- [ ] All API calls wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 24 — Module List
body:
## Page 24 — Module List
**Route:** `/admin/modules`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 10.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Drag-to-reorder list (drag handle icon)
- [ ] Table: drag handle, code, name, type (SYSTEM/CUSTOM), permissions count, status
- [ ] System modules: Delete disabled
- [ ] Optimistic update on drag reorder
- [ ] `PATCH /modules/reorder` wired up (body: `{orderedIds:[]}`)
- [ ] `DELETE /modules/:id` cascades to permissions
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 25 — Module Create / Edit
body:
## Page 25 — Module Create / Edit
**Route:** `/admin/modules/new` | `/:id/edit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 10.2

### Checklist
- [ ] Simple form: code (uppercase, unique), name EN+AR, description, Is System (read-only in edit), status
- [ ] Module Code disabled in edit
- [ ] Is System Module cannot change after creation
- [ ] `POST /modules` and `PUT /modules/:id` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 26 — Permission List
body:
## Page 26 — Permission List
**Route:** `/admin/permissions`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 10.3

### Checklist
- [ ] Table grouped by module: code, module, operation (color-coded badge), name EN
- [ ] Filters: Search, Module dropdown, Operation multi-select (7 ops)
- [ ] Delete warns about roles using this permission
- [ ] `GET /permissions?moduleId=&operation=` wired up
- [ ] Permission gates per action
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 27 — Permission Create / Edit
body:
## Page 27 — Permission Create / Edit
**Route:** `/admin/permissions/new` | `/:id/edit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 10.4

### Checklist
- [ ] Simple form: module (dropdown), operation (dropdown), code (auto-suggested, disabled in edit), name EN+AR, description
- [ ] Permission Code auto-suggested from module+operation
- [ ] `POST /permissions` and `PUT /permissions/:id` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 28 — Audit Log
body:
## Page 28 — Audit Log
**Route:** `/admin/audit`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 11.1

### Checklist
- [ ] Full-width filterable table with date range (required, default last 7 days)
- [ ] Columns: timestamp (DESC default), user (link), tenant, action (color-coded), entity type, entity name, IP, result (tick/cross)
- [ ] Expandable rows: JSON diff panel (old=red, new=green) using `react-diff-viewer`
- [ ] Filters: Date range, User autocomplete, Tenant, Action type (multi-select), Entity type (multi-select), Result radio, IP
- [ ] Tenant column hidden for tenant-scoped users
- [ ] Export CSV + Export PDF (compliance report with filter header)
- [ ] `GET /audit` with all filter params wired up
- [ ] Role access restrictions (super-admin sees all, tenant admin sees own)
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 29 — Audit Event Detail
body:
## Page 29 — Audit Event Detail
**Route:** `/admin/audit/:id`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 11.2

### Checklist
- [ ] Detail card: event ID, timestamp, user (link), action (color badge), entity type/name, IP, user agent (parsed), session ID (link), result + error
- [ ] Side-by-side JSON diff viewer: old_value (red panel) vs new_value (green panel)
- [ ] Back to Audit Log button (preserves filters)
- [ ] View User link → `/admin/users/:id`
- [ ] `GET /audit/:id` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 30 — Active Sessions Monitor
body:
## Page 30 — Active Sessions Monitor
**Route:** `/admin/sessions`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 11.3

### Checklist
- [ ] Live active session count badge
- [ ] Auto-refreshing table (30s via React Query `refetchInterval`)
- [ ] Columns: user (link), tenant, login time, last activity (relative, red if >25min), expires (countdown), IP, browser+OS, duration
- [ ] Sessions near timeout (>25 min inactive) highlighted orange
- [ ] Terminate Session per row + Terminate All for a user
- [ ] Auto Refresh toggle (default ON) + Refresh Now button
- [ ] Tenant column hidden for tenant-scoped users
- [ ] `GET /sessions/active` wired up
- [ ] RTL/AR support

title: [Frontend] Page 31 — Failed Login Report
body:
## Page 31 — Failed Login Report
**Route:** `/admin/security/failed-logins`
**Blueprint ref:** Section 11.4

### Checklist
- [ ] Stats cards: Total Failed (24h), Unique IPs, Locked Accounts
- [ ] Table: timestamp, username tried, user (link if found), IP (red if >5 attempts), attempts count, account locked (lock icon + timestamp), error
- [ ] IPs with >5 attempts highlighted red
- [ ] Filters: Date range (required, default last 24h), Username, IP, Locked Only toggle
- [ ] Unlock Account inline (PATCH status=ACTIVE, resets failed_login_attempts)
- [ ] Export CSV
- [ ] `GET /audit?actionType=FAILED_LOGIN` wired up
- [ ] `GET /security/failed-login-summary` for stats
- [ ] RTL/AR support
